title: Advanced Dynamic Programming and State Compression · Structure Brief: Loop Order
summary: Scale sequence alignment and constrained-selection models beyond naive tables. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 loop order increment in an optimized DP with equivalence evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Derive iteration order from transition dependencies rather than coding habit.
Compress DP rows only when overwritten states are no longer needed.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
